productName: Northwest CCELL® Classic Cart - 1g - Super Lemon Haze
description: A sativa vape cartridge filled with Super Lemon Haze oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of lemon, citrus, and lime, with a bright, heady lift.
